title: SuperCake
description: SuperCake Mod introduces a delicious variety of cakes and pies to your Minecraft world
body:
🧁 **SuperCake Mod**
====================

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_05d120f0-a578-4de5-9afb-7cb3b263eaa0.png)

We will be constantly updating the mod!

### 🍰 **About the Mod**

SuperCake Mod introduces a delicious variety of cakes and pies to your Minecraft world, each with unique effects to enhance your gameplay! Whether you're looking for a boost in battle or a tasty treat during your adventures, these cakes are sure to sweeten your experience.

* * *

### 🍴 **Features**

*   **Chicken Mushroom Pie**: A hearty meal to keep you going strong.
*   **Chocolate Cake**: A sweet dessert that boosts your energy.
*   **Fish Pie**: Perfect for aquatic adventures.
*   **Golden Apple Pie**: Offers powerful regeneration and buffs.
*   **Apple Pie**: A classic treat for quick recovery.
*   **Meat Pie**: Provides high saturation for long journeys.
*   **Shuba (Herring Under a Fur Coat)**: A unique dish with mysterious effects.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1168665/description_021a8438-6226-4f80-95a0-322d955e80f8.png)

* * *

### 📥 **How to Install**

1.  Download the mod from [CurseForge](#).
2.  Place the `.jar` file in your `mods` folder.
3.  Enjoy your tasty new treats in-game!

* * *

### 🌟 **Feedback and Support**

Have suggestions or found a bug? Share your thoughts with us on [CurseForge](#) or join the discussion on our Discord server.

* * *

### 🎉 **Bon Appétit!**

Dive into the world of SuperCake and make your Minecraft experience both fun and delicious!
